rationale: In the citing paper, Yang and Allenby (2003) appears in a grouped literature citation as an example of prior work on consumer preference interaction/interdependence. The discussion uses that stream for broad positioning, but it does not single out this specific paper's model, assumptions, measures, or findings for direct reuse in the proposed intrahousehold behavioral interaction model. There is no clear paper-specific methodological borrowing or empirical benchmark tied to this citation beyond background framing.
